message:
refactor(membrane): extract shared now_utc_iso_like into dedicated util module

Consolidate four independent copies of now_utc_iso_like() — scattered
across ptr_validator, alien_cs_metrics, metrics, and runtime_math/mod
with subtly different implementations — into a single correct version
in the new frankenlibc-membrane::util module using the Hinnant
algorithm for civil date computation.

All call sites (including runtime_policy in frankenlibc-abi) now
delegate to util::now_utc_iso_like() and util::civil_date_from_unix_days().

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
